hero.label: Our Services
hero.title: End-to-End Textile Recycling Solutions
hero.description: From collection and sorting to processing and delivery, we handle every step of the fiber recycling process so you don't have to.

overviewHeader.label: What We Offer
overviewHeader.title: Services Built Around Your Needs
overviewHeader.description: Whether you need to offload textile waste or source quality recycled fibers, we have the capabilities and experience to deliver.

overview.title: Fiber Processing
overview.description: Our core service. We take raw textile waste and transform it into clean, graded, ready-to-use fibers through mechanical processing. From opening and cleaning to blending and baling, we handle it all.

overview.title: Waste Collection & Logistics
overview.description: We coordinate the pickup, transportation, and receiving of textile waste from your facility. Scheduled or on-demand collection keeps your operation running smoothly.

overview.title: Custom Blending & Grading
overview.description: Need a specific fiber composition? We create custom blends and grades to your exact specifications, ensuring consistent quality for your manufacturing process.

processHeader.label: How It Works
processHeader.title: Our Recycling Process
processHeader.description: A proven, systematic approach to transforming textile waste into high-quality recycled fibers.

process.title: Collection & Receiving
process.description: We collect textile waste directly from your facility or receive shipments at our processing plant. All incoming materials are documented and inspected upon arrival.

process.title: Sorting & Classification
process.description: Materials are sorted by fiber type, color, and quality. This critical step ensures the right materials go into the right processing streams for optimal output quality.

process.title: Mechanical Processing
process.description: Sorted materials are opened, cleaned, and processed through our equipment. Fibers are separated, contaminants removed, and material is prepared for its next use.

process.title: Blending & Quality Control
process.description: Processed fibers are blended to meet customer specifications. Every batch undergoes quality checks to ensure consistency in fiber length, cleanliness, and composition.

process.title: Baling & Delivery
process.description: Finished fibers are compressed into bales for efficient storage and transport. We coordinate delivery to your facility on your schedule.

details.label: Core Service
details.title: Fiber Processing
details.description: Our state-of-the-art processing facility handles a wide range of textile waste materials, transforming them into clean, graded fibers that are ready for reuse in manufacturing.
features: Cotton, polyester, nylon, and blended fiber processing
Mechanical opening, cleaning, and fiber separation
Consistent output quality with batch-level documentation
Scalable capacity to match your volume requirements

details.label: Logistics
details.title: Waste Collection & Transportation
details.description: Getting your textile waste to us shouldn't be a headache. Our collection service handles the logistics so you can stay focused on your core business.
features: Scheduled recurring pickups or on-demand collection
Containerized collection for easy loading at your facility
Help meeting your waste diversion and sustainability targets

details.label: Tailored Solutions
details.title: Custom Blending & Grading
details.description: Not all fibers are created equal, and neither are your requirements. We work with you to develop custom fiber products that meet your exact production specifications.
features: Custom fiber blends by composition, color, and staple length
Multiple grade levels to match your quality requirements
Sample runs and testing before full production
Technical consultation on fiber selection and performance

ctaBanner.title: Have a Unique Fiber Need?
ctaBanner.description: We've been solving fiber challenges for over a century. Tell us what you need, and we'll find a way to deliver.
